content:
MODULE: cosmos.core.tmux_session_manager
FILE: cosmos/core/tmux_session_manager.py (610 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos tmux Session Manager.

"I've created immortal robot sessions! They'll outlive us all!"

This module manages persistent tmux sessions for long-running agents like Claude Code,
enabling detachable/re-attachable development workflows that survive connection drops.

Features:
- Automatic session 

CLASSES:
- SessionState(Enum): States of a tmux session.
- SessionType(Enum): Types of persistent sessions.
- SessionConfig: Configuration for a tmux session.
- TmuxSession: Represents a managed tmux session.
  Methods: def is_active(self) -> bool
  Methods: def is_idle(self) -> bool
  Methods: def idle_time_seconds(self) -> float
- TmuxSessionManager: Manages persistent tmux sessions for long-running agent operations.

Features:
-
  Methods: async def start(self)
  Methods: async def stop(self)
  Methods: async def create_session(self, name: str, session_type: SessionType, command: Optional[str]=None, wo
  Methods: async def send_command(self, session_id: str, command: str, wait_for_output: bool=True, timeout_seco
  Methods: async def get_session_output(self, session_id: str, lines: int=100) -> list[str]
  Methods: async def destroy_session(self, session_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: async def get_or_create_session(self, session_type: SessionType, handler_id: Optional[str]=None) -> 
  Methods: def list_sessions(self) -> list[dict]

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- async def get_claude_session(handler_id: str='claude_tmux') -> TmuxSession
- async def get_development_session(handler_id: str='dev') -> TmuxSession
- async def run_in_session(session_type: SessionType, command: str, timeout: float=30.0) -> dict
